Appearances:
Patrick J. Evans, of the Law Offices of Patrick J. Evans, Tel. 714.594.5722, for plaintiffs Sue Eicherly;
P. Patty Li, of Office of the Attorney General, Tel. 415.703.1577, for defendants Commission on Judicial Performance.

Ruling: A R G U E D. DEFENDANT COMMISSION ON JUDICIAL PERFORMANCE DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is taken UNDER SUBMISSION. The Court will issue a ruling/written order. Judge: Stephen Murphy; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-21-2017 Continued To Mar-24-17 At 02:30 P.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT COMMISSION ON JUDICIAL PERFORMANCE DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT will be heard by Judge Stephen Murphy on March 24, 2017, at 2:30 p.m., in Department 302. Judge Kahn has recused himself from hearing matters in this case. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-27-2017 Continued To Mar-21-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT COMMISSION ON JUDICIAL PERFORMANCE DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to March 21, 2017, at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302, per the agreement of the parties.
